principles: Quota posture must be derived from measured usage snapshots rather than static configuration alone.
Warning, soft-limit, and hard-limit semantics must be defined once and reused consistently by downstream alerting, blocking, and console work.
Quota posture must preserve tenant and workspace isolation and must never widen scope beyond the caller's authorization boundary.
Evidence freshness inherited from usage consumption must remain visible so degraded or unavailable telemetry never appears as confidently healthy quota posture.

threshold_types.description: Crossing this threshold indicates elevated attention is required but does not imply block semantics.
Crossing this threshold indicates quota overage posture that downstream consumers may surface or govern, without forcing hard blocking in this task.
Crossing this threshold indicates the strongest posture for the dimension and is the signal later enforcement work will consume.

policy_modes.description: The dimension has an explicit threshold policy and should be evaluated against it.
The dimension remains visible in posture output but has no enforced threshold posture in this increment.

posture_states.description: Measured usage remains below the configured warning threshold or below the first configured threshold.
Measured usage is at or above the warning threshold while still below the soft and hard thresholds.
Measured usage is at or above the soft limit while still below the hard limit.
Measured usage is at or above the hard limit and can be consumed by later enforcement work.
Usage evidence exists but is degraded; the posture remains visible and should be surfaced with caution.
Usage evidence is unavailable, so the dimension posture cannot be treated as trustworthy for confident enforcement.
The dimension is visible but intentionally has no enforced threshold policy in this increment.

rules: Threshold values must be numeric and greater than or equal to zero.
When present together, warning_threshold must be less than or equal to soft_limit.
When present together, soft_limit must be less than or equal to hard_limit.
When warning_threshold and hard_limit are present without soft_limit, warning_threshold must be less than or equal to hard_limit.
Equality at a threshold is inclusive and transitions the dimension into the corresponding posture state.
A dimension in policy_mode unbounded must not require threshold values.
Every posture result must include every supported dimension for the requested scope.
Dimensions with degraded or unavailable evidence remain visible in the response catalog instead of being dropped.
Headroom fields may be null when a threshold is intentionally absent or the dimension is unbounded.
The quota posture audit summary must stay compatible with the canonical audit event schema and reuse the quota_metering subsystem id.
Workspace-scoped responses may reference only their own workspace while tenant-scoped responses may summarize posture for only the requested tenant.
The audit summary must never embed raw request identifiers, secret material, or cross-tenant payload detail.
